title: App Settings - General
scenario: Verify that tapping the hamburger icon and selecting General opens the General screen with Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses sections, and pressing Back returns to the Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the hamburger menu icon (App Settings) in the top-left corner.
4. Observe the new screen that opens.
5. Verify the following sections are displayed: Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses.
6. Press the Back button (either the device's hardware back button or the on-screen back arrow).
7. Observe the screen that appears after pressing Back.
expected: Tapping the hamburger icon and selecting General opens a screen displaying sections for Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses. Pressing Back returns the user to the Poly Lens Menu.
